title: SASC Advances Nominations of Dr. Plumb a...
description: The Senate Armed Services Committee today voted by voice en bloc to favorably report out a list of 8 pending military promotions in the Army, Navy,...
text:
The Senate Armed Services Committee today voted by voice en bloc to favorably report out a list of 8 pending military promotions in the Army, Navy, and Space Force.
The committee also voted 21 to 5 to favorably report out the following civilian nomination:
- Dr. Radha Plumb to be Deputy Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
